concepts.finding: Keyphrase extraction methods fall into supervised (classification-based, sequence labeling) and unsupervised (graph-based like TextRank, topic-based like LDA, embedding-based like EmbedRank).
concepts.implication: Keyphrase extraction techniques are directly applicable to query understanding: extracting key concepts from queries can improve query expansion, intent classification, and document retrieval.
concepts.open_question: Can keyphrase extraction from queries improve retrieval accuracy compared to using full query text?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Queries expanded with automatically extracted keyphrases will improve retrieval recall@100 by 10%+ compared to raw query text for verbose or ambiguous queries.
